description: Style NoteThis beautifully toned pair from catwalk are great to tone down a blingy ensemble or class up a simple monochrome theme. We love the colour patterning and overall design aesthetic of this lovely pair. Buy now before we run out of stock!Product DetailsSilver sandal with transparent plastic straps on the forefoot and midfoot with crystal embellishments and an ankle strap with a tang claspSmooth footbed with branding embossed on the heelPlastic outsole with textured rubber outsole on the forefoot and a heelMaterial and CarePlastic and syntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 3"
